sections.paragraph:
או    או - 'ô 'av - o, av

The first form is presumed to be the “constructive” or genitival form of the second form which is short for H185; desire (and so probably in Pro 31:4); hence (by way of alternative) or, also if: - also, and, either, if, at the least, X nor, or, otherwise, then, whether.
